    ;; Tower 2: height 1
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3: height 1
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)

    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)
